Massive Heartwood Thorn  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
Backstab DMG: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Skill Mod: Backstab +10% (28 Max)
DEX: +15 STA: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +75 ENDUR: +25
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
Required level of 55.
Effect: Combust (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Massive Heartwood Thorn
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
Backstab DMG: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Skill Mod: Backstab +10% (28 Max)
DEX: +15 STA: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +75 ENDUR: +25
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
Required level of 55.
Effect: Combust (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Jaradis Stormcaller
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 17:45:26
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Growth
NPC Name
Tunare


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Growth


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Tunare
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2003 at 9:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175496031
101 posts
On The Nameless she has been killed more times than I can count. She is not that hard in light of the new PoP mobsand to get right down too it, her guards (massive ents that silence) are probably harder to kill over all cause of the tactics involved in taking them vs. her. She is just a stand a duke it out mob and doesnt even move after you engage even if you stop engaging her. I was raids with Euphoria that killed her 3 times and none of those times did she drop the dagger.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 29 2003 at 12:37 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I sold one of these when the were dropable
hmmm
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2003 at 3:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788728115
1 post
I may be mistaken, but last I heard RB haste was not effective in offhand. May have been misinformed though
▲ Page top
RE: hmmm
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2003 at 12:03 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591787710499
36 posts
You were misinformed.

Seething Fury is a worn effect, which means that in any slot if can be equipped in will do fine.

This is one of the growing number of piercers you can get nowadays that meets the requirement to offhand RB.
▲ Page top
Huh?
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2002 at 11:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783340995
9 posts
OK i am an extreme newbie and i know i'll get a big line of messages for this but since its 15/20 isn't that as good/ better than the ragebringer?
▲ Page top
RE: Huh?
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2002 at 6:18 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344063207
View User Forum
177 posts
Yes its much much better than the epic(15/25)
But the effect on epic(40% haste + 40?atk) makes rogue epic a nice offhand weapon with something like this in mainhand.
Killing Tunare is ALOT harder than killing any mobs needed for epics.. thats why its loot is better.
▲ Page top
Huh?
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2002 at 11:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783340995
9 posts
OK i am an extreme newbie and i know i'll get a big line of messages for this but since its 15/20 isn't that as good/ better than the ragebringer?
▲ Page top
blah
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2002 at 1:16 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592254489254
14 posts
Epic is a great off hand weapon due to the atk bonus and haste... plut 100hp. Most tend to use this as the combo even if they have another godly item... aka khalrazar, or bloodbath, then if you are killing those mobs you can afford to switch out haste items etc etc etc... but for the most part folks. RB in offhand is very practical for the fact of stats and the haste. There are plenty of rogue weapons that take precidence over RB in prim hand. And this is a fine example of one of those.
▲ Page top
hmm
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2002 at 8:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754785015
View User Forum
Scholar
35 posts
Im using the Acid Pocked Mithril Blade in primary and RB on offhand. My guild has one of these and hoefully grabbing another today. Id keep this in primary and RB in offhand as I dont have a great haste item aside from epic.
▲ Page top
Not so rare
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2002 at 7:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248557879
2 posts
The rarity says "ultra-rare"

She seems to have this dagger half the time, and at our last kill she had 2 of those.

This weapon is to be used as primary, unless you have an even better ratio weapon than 15/20, and Ragebringer is a very good choice off-hand with it, especially on heavily armoured targets, as in Luclin.
▲ Page top
RE: Not so rare
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2003 at 4:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786073412
1 post
Yea its not so rare at all from what I have noticed so far. Our guild just started killing Tunare (clearing the plane is a huge pain). The other day was the second time we killed her. The first time she dropped 1, the second time she dropped 2. I love this weapon. I put my epic in offhand and go to town.

Max backstab at level 65 with this is 614 damage without disc or crit. The backstab Mod is so nice.

The backstab modifier also increases your minimun backstab damage on your duelist disc. It does a min. of 416 on duelist. Still only 130 (lvl 65 standard) on normal minimum backstab though.

The proc rocks big time. 186 nuke (at level 65) before 65 I think its a 182 proc. If you put some points in Ingenuity(sp) the proc can crit. Ingenuity 1 = 242 crit blast, Ingenuity 2 = 303 crit blast.. not sure on the lvl 3 Ingenuity dont have it yet.

As for normal crits without disc I have hit a 1056 crit as my high so far. Havent hit any good duelist crits yet.

Edited, Tue Feb 11 16:02:52 2003
▲ Page top
fyi
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2002 at 4:00 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765402564
3 posts
Not to sound snobbish or whatever, but to those who are talking about how good it would be to have the epic in ones offhand... byt he time you get to have a chance at this item, you should already have at least one extra haste item thats faster then the epic. So basically, I havent wielded my epic in many many months 9-/
▲ Page top
RE: fyi
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2002 at 2:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776927098
4 posts
Uhhh the epic effect is much better than most haste effects out there that and the epic has some very nice additional stats on it... Thorn Primary Epic Secondary is an uber combo.
▲ Page top
RE: fyi
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2002 at 8:35 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591781550978
1 post

My guild has several of these, and each rogue uses an epic in their offhand. All of the 41% haste items have gone to warriors, monks, rangers, etc. who were upgrading from 36% haste. /shrug
▲ Page top
RE: fyi
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2003 at 1:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341528227
View User Forum
Scholar
25 posts
Indeed, unless your guild kills VT or NToV mobs on a regular basis, you won't see many haste item drops that are better than the RB. With such scarcity, powarog is right--don't expect a rogue to get any kind of loot like that when it DOES drop. Your MT, SA, TA, etc. will all get these 41%+ haste items before you will even garner the most remote consideration. So keep that epic in your offhand and grab one of these other piercers.
▲ Page top
RE: fyi
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2002 at 7:20 AM Rating: Good

# Apr 12 2002 at 11:40 PM Rating: Decent
LifegiverOfXegony
Scholar
105 posts
Nah, the proc is a straight 182 point nuke, with no debuffing effect or anything else to provide extra taunt. Considering that 182 points is about 1/3 of a good backstab, it's really just small potatoes.

# Nov 20 2001 at 8:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618791702156
192 posts
not at all, it was 12-16. Then it was nerfed to 11/17 and the proc on it was reduced to a 1/4 of its previous power. Not 15/19, that would be pretty much the same as ragebringer; which with the 40% haste is around 15-18 (correct me if i'm wrong). Although the proc is would be highly resisted and pretty much useless in upper encounters this dagger is very(very, very) good.
